headline: Take-Two Insider Sale Raises Questions On Valuation And Analyst Targets
summary: Chief Legal Officer Daniel P. Emerson recently sold shares of Take-Two Interactive Software (NasdaqGS:TTWO). The sale followed the company reporting fiscal results that were materially better than earlier expectations. The transaction adds a fresh data point to insider activity at a time of heightened interest in Take-Two's performance and outlook. Take-Two, known for franchises such as Grand Theft Auto and NBA 2K, sits at the center of the global video game and interactive entertainment...
